name: Zendure Online Monitoring (MAC/AP)
description: Sends Zendure power station data to online monitoring system via MAC address resolution

description_lng.de: Sendet Zendure Powerstation Daten an Online-Überwachungssystem über MAC-Adressen-Auflösung

author: TheSolarApp

parameters.name: MAC
parameters.label: MAC Address
parameters.description: MAC address of the Zendure power station

parameters.name: SERIAL
parameters.label: Serial Number
parameters.description: Serial number of the Zendure power station

parameters.name: DATA_DURATION
parameters.label: Data Fetch Interval (s)
parameters.description: Time difference between fetching new inverter data in seconds

parameters.name: DEBUG
parameters.label: Debug Mode
parameters.description: Enable debug logging to see more information

parameters.name: ONLINE_CLIENT_TOKEN
parameters.label: Client Token
parameters.description: Client secret token from monitoring system settings

description_lng.de: Client Secret Token aus Monitoring System Einstellungen

parameters.name: ONLINE_URL_1
parameters.label: Primary Monitoring URL
parameters.description: First domain to send data to

description_lng.de: Erste Domain zum Senden der Daten

parameters.name: ONLINE_URL_2
parameters.label: Backup Monitoring URL
parameters.description: Backup domain if first is down

description_lng.de: Backup Domain falls erste nicht erreichbar

parameters.name: ONLINE_DEVICE_ID
parameters.label: Device ID
parameters.description: Device ID for online monitoring (only important if multiple devices are in one system)

description_lng.de: Geräte ID für Online-Monitoring (nur wichtig bei mehreren Geräten in einem System)

parameters.name: INTERVAL_RESOLVE_MAC
parameters.label: MAC Resolution Interval (s)
parameters.description: Interval in seconds to resolve MAC address to IP

description_lng.de: Intervall in Sekunden zur Auflösung der MAC-Adresse zu IP
